New
Meet Korey, our AI agent for product teams
Fast Project Management
for Software Teams
And Their Agents
Shortcut is a fast and enjoyable project management platform with issue tracking, sprints and roadmaps.
Shortcut is a fast and enjoyable project management platform with issue tracking, sprints and roadmaps.
Shortcut is a fast and enjoyable project management platform with issue tracking, sprints and roadmaps.
Get Started - free forever
Free forever. No credit card required.
Trusted by thousands of software teams
Product Development
Task tracking and sprints
Hand-off work to
any teammate,
‍
human or agent.
Track your work from early idea to release, whether it's done by people or agents. Customize workflows, view and filter spaces, and keep everything moving fast.
Get started - it’s free
Discover Key Features
Product Planning
See progress from
every teammate
and agent
.
Map out projects across teams, track work from people and agents in one place, communicate health status, and share target dates.
Get started - it’s free
Discover Key Features
Objectives
strategic Planning
Connect Work to
Goals.
Create goals, align teams, and connect individual projects to company objectives.
Get started - it’s free
Discover Objectives
Customizations
Work the way you want.
Just enough customization to keep things simple but flexible to adapt to how your team works.
Get started - it’s free
View Customizations
Sprints
Quickly prioritize and keep track of the work your team needs to be focused on week-to-week with Iterations.
Work In Progress Limits
Set Story limits in each workflow state to stop work from piling up and keep everything moving smoothly.
Custom Fields
Leverage custom fields to help you establish a more structured process for you and your teams.
Speed & Efficiency
Quick load times combined with keyboard shortcuts let you work faster than ever.
VCS Automations
Seamless integrations with GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket, + other tools mean Shortcut updates while you work.
Git Workflows
Seamless integrations with GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket, + other tools mean Shortcut updates while you work.
Humans + Agent
Korey:
the AI agent for
product development.
Put agents to work right alongside your team. Accelerate your product engineering workflows, and move from idea to spec to PR in minutes.
Try Korey
Shortcut for Agents
Work side-by-side with AI to scope tasks, write PRs, and track progress right in Shortcut.
Shortcut MCP Server
Connect Shortcut to tools like Cursor and Claude Code to get agents coding and synced to GitHub.
Integrations
Connect to your entire workflow
From GitHub to Slack to Sentry, you can
integrate Shortcut with tools you love.
Get started - it’s free
View Integrations
Security
Built for scale and security
Shortcut scales with your team with best-in-class features, security, and privacy. Scale without friction - whether you're a "team" of 1 or an org of 1,000+
Get started - it’s free
Learn more
GDPR and SOC2 compliant
|
Google SSO included for all plans
|
SSO and SCIM available
|
HIPAA & BAA Ready
Customers
What our customers have to say.
We love our users because they love us. Check out some of the love they’ve sent our way.
Read All Customer Stories
Shortcut is a project management platform that's simple to use and also has the functionality to help with prioritization and collaboration.
Arnaud Pichery
,
VP of Engineering, Dataiku
,
We unified the whole organization under a single umbrella, but the different teams still have the freedom and flexibility to work how they want.
Tom Randle
,
CEO, Geckoboard
,
Build what’s
next
.
Experience the most enjoyable, powerful way for your team to work.
Get started - it’s free

Frequently Asked Questions
Some questions about Shortcut are asked frequently. We've answered the most frequent of those frequent questions below.
What can I expect each billing cycle if I'm on the yearly Team or Business Plan?
For these plans, we use metered billing, which means we charge you per user, per month during your yearly billing cycle.
We want to cancel our subscription. Can we get a refund?
Shortcut does not offer pro-rated refunds for cancelled subscriptions.
How do I add a credit card in Shortcut?
To add a credit card, go to
Settings > Workspace > Billing
, and update your billing information in the Card section. It’s always a good idea to review and update your billing contact information while you’re there.
What happens when the trial period ends?
If you have 10 or fewer users when the trial ends, you can simply use Shortcut for free or manually choose one of our paid plans to get access to the features included within it. If you have more than 10 users and want to continue using Shortcut after your trial ends, subscribe to one of our paid plans.
Do I have to wait until the end of the trial to subscribe to a paid plan?
Nope! You are welcome to add a credit card at any time, but you won’t be charged until your 14-day Trial is over.
What can I do in Shortcut during the 14-day trial period?
Anything! The Shortcut Trial is meant to give you an opportunity to truly test Shortcut’s features and to build processes that work for your team. You’ll have full access to Shortcut as a robust tool, including (but definitely not limited to): an Organization with unlimited
Workspaces
and
user management
, unlimited
Observer users
,
our API
, and
outgoing webhooks
. Feel free to experiment with using Teams, Epics and Objectives, Stories, Labels, and Custom Workflows together to create a project management environment unique and useful to your team.
For more billing information, check out our
Help Center.
But wait, there’s more....
Shortcut is honored to extend a full membership at no cost to eligible Nonprofit organizations as thanks for the hard work.
The Shortcut
Nonprofit
Plan
Shortcut is free for qualifying nonprofits. Thank you for the hard work your team does to make the world a better place.
Apply Now
The Shortcut Startup Program
Get 12 months free if your startup has fewer than 50 employees. Open to all startups, regardless of VC-fund or accelerator affiliation.
Get started now
Build what’s
next
.

analysis.name: Shortcut
analysis.tagline: Fast Project Management for Software Teams And Their Agents
analysis.value_proposition: A fast, enjoyable project management platform with issue tracking, sprints, and roadmaps built for software teams collaborating with AI agents.
analysis.ideal_customer: Software product & engineering teams (startups to mature software companies) that want a fast, developer-friendly alternative to Jira with AI agent collaboration built in

features.name: kanban boards
features.description: Track work on customizable kanban-style boards with saved filters (Spaces/Boards).
features.evidence_quote: Spaces/Boards - Customized views of your Stories on Kanban with saved filters

features.name: stories and epics
features.description: Core work-item hierarchy for tracking issues and grouped work.
features.evidence_quote: Stories and Epics

features.name: backlog
features.description: Sort, manage and prioritize upcoming work before it enters a workflow.
features.evidence_quote: Better sort, manage and prioritize work before it makes its way into a Workflow

features.name: iterations
features.description: Time-boxed sprints for a collection of stories.
features.evidence_quote: Define a time-boxed period of development for a collection of Stories

features.name: roadmaps
features.description: Visualize epics across teams on a big-picture roadmap.
features.evidence_quote: Visualize Epics on a Roadmap

features.name: objectives and key results
features.description: Group and track KRs and related epics tied to business goals.
features.evidence_quote: Group and track Key Results and related Epics connected to business outcomes and goals

features.name: tactical objectives
features.description: Group and track epics related to releases and specific work.
features.evidence_quote: Group and track Epics related to releases and work

features.name: docs
features.description: Collaborative docs and templates linked to work items.
features.evidence_quote: Docs and Docs Templates - Use Docs

features.name: ai agent collaboration
features.description: Collaborate with AI teammates directly in Shortcut.
features.evidence_quote: AI Agent Collaboration - Collaborate with AI teammates in Shortcut

features.name: korey ai agent
features.description: Native AI agent for product engineering workflows.
features.evidence_quote: Korey - AI agent for product engineering workflows

features.name: mcp server
features.description: Access workspace data securely via MCP server for AI tools.
features.evidence_quote: MCP Server - Access your workspace data in a simple and secure way

features.name: work in progress limits
features.description: Set story limits per workflow state to keep work flowing.
features.evidence_quote: Set limit on Stories in progress to keep work moving smoothly

features.name: customizable workflows
features.description: Customize how stories move from creation to completion.
features.evidence_quote: Customize the way Stories move from creation to completion

features.name: custom fields
features.description: Advanced custom fields to categorize work.
features.evidence_quote: Categorize work with advanced Custom Fields

features.name: automations
features.description: Automate repetitive tasks and busy work.
features.evidence_quote: Manage repetitive tasks with Automations

features.name: epic and iteration reports
features.description: Visualize progress on epics and iterations.
features.evidence_quote: Visualize progress on Epics and Iterations

features.name: metrics dashboard
features.description: Metrics dashboard with velocity, ARC chart, cycle/lead time, cumulative flow, completed stories, epics list.
features.evidence_quote: Metrics dashboard, Velocity chart, ARC Chart, Cycle Time / Lead Time, Cumulative Flow Diagram

features.name: advanced reports
features.description: Reports beyond 100 days including Time Spent in Workflow State and Created vs. Completed.
features.evidence_quote: Create reports beyond 100 days and access reports like Time Spent in Workflow State and Created vs. Completed

features.name: teams
features.description: Organize users into teams and squads (up to 5 on Team plan; unlimited on Business+).
features.evidence_quote: Organize users into teams and squads

features.name: multiple workspaces
features.description: Additional workspaces for sandboxing, sensitive data separation, or agency clients.
features.evidence_quote: Create additional Workspaces for Sandboxing, to protect sensitive information, or for Agencies

features.name: search operators
features.description: Advanced search using operators across the workspace.
features.evidence_quote: Commonly searched topics: spaces github search operators

features.name: keyboard shortcuts
features.description: Keyboard shortcuts and quick load times for fast navigation.
features.evidence_quote: Quick load times combined with keyboard shortcuts let you work faster than ever

features.name: csv import
features.description: CSV importer for bringing in existing data.
features.evidence_quote: CSV Importer

features.name: import from jira

features.evidence_quote: Import from Jira

features.evidence_quote: Import from Trello

features.name: import from pivotal tracker
features.description: Migration tool for Pivotal Tracker users.
features.evidence_quote: Import from Pivotal Tracker

features.name: api
features.description: Open REST API for custom integrations and automation.
features.evidence_quote: API - Create custom integrations and send/retrieve data with our open API

features.name: webhooks
features.description: Outgoing webhooks to trigger external actions.
features.evidence_quote: Registering Outgoing Webhooks (API)

features.name: vcs integrations
features.description: Attach commits, branches and PRs from GitHub/GitLab/Bitbucket to stories.
features.evidence_quote: Seamless integrations with GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket, + other tools

differentiators: Fast, enjoyable UX explicitly positioned against Jira
Built for software teams AND their AI agents (Korey + agent collaboration + MCP)
Deep VCS integrations (GitHub/GitLab/Bitbucket) with commit/branch/PR attachment
Free forever tier with GitHub, Slack, and Figma integrations included
Speed emphasis: quick load times + keyboard shortcuts

free_tier.limits: Up to 10 users, 1 team, 1 workspace, 1 customizable workflow

tiers.name: Free
tiers.headline_inclusions: Kanban, Roadmap, Reports, Iterations, Docs, GitHub/Slack/Figma integrations; up to 10 users

tiers.name: Team
tiers.headline_inclusions: Everything in Free + full Reports, WIP limits, multiple workflows, Automations, all integrations

tiers.name: Business
tiers.headline_inclusions: Everything in Team + unlimited everything, Objectives/KRs, advanced Custom Fields, advanced Reports, multi-workspace

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: Everything in Business + volume discounts, SSO/SCIM, premier SLA, custom terms, dedicated Slack, onboarding

pricing.notes: Monthly prices: Team $10, Business $16; yearly prices: Team $8.50, Business $12 (up to ~25% savings). 14-day free trial with full access, no credit card required.
